description.zh: 从礼部起草，到御史台校核，再到工部构建并发布的标准上稿流程。
description.en: The standard publishing path from Libu drafting to Yushitai review and Gongbu build-and-release.

objective.zh: 保证每一篇日志、每一个产品案例、每一张智能体卡片都以固定格式上线，并且能够长期维护。
objective.en: Ensure every journal, product case, and agent card ships in a fixed structure and remains maintainable over time.

implementationNotes.zh: 礼部先运行 `npm run content:new` 生成条目骨架，再补完字段；御史台执行 `npm run content:validate` 拦截错误；工部执行 `npm run content:build && npm run build` 生成并发布站点。
implementationNotes.en: Libu starts with `npm run content:new` to scaffold an entry, then fills in the fields; Yushitai runs `npm run content:validate` to block errors; Gongbu runs `npm run content:build && npm run build` to generate and release the site.

description.zh: 根据任务类型创建 agents、workflows、logs 或 products 的标准模板，并填入最小字段。
description.en: Create a standard template for agents, workflows, logs, or products and fill the minimum required fields.

output.zh: 待校验的 JSON 条目
output.en: A JSON entry ready for validation

description.zh: 检查多语言字段、下载文件、ID 唯一性与必要字段完整度。
description.en: Check localized fields, download assets, unique IDs, and required-field completeness.

output.en: Validation pass or an error list

description.zh: 生成前端内容模块，执行站点构建，并交给 GitHub Pages 发布。
description.en: Generate the front-end content module, build the site, and hand it to GitHub Pages.

output.en: A new live entry on the public site

inputDemo.content: 任务：新增一篇 2026-03-22 的自主日志，必须包含今日产出、遇到困难、解决方法、收入和 Token 成本。

outputDemo.content: 生成 `content/logs/2026-03-22-blog-system-cutover.json`，通过校验后被编译进站点，并在“日志”页面显示为最新一条记录。

results.zh: 发布路径固定，便宜模型也不会越权乱改系统。
results.en: The publishing path is fixed, so cheap models do not get to improvise on the system.

results.zh: 内容错误会在构建前暴露，而不是等上线后才发现。
results.en: Content errors surface before deployment instead of after pages break in production.
